entries.source: Yes. Schools can use the public product first, then discuss custom AI learning spaces with school-specific workflows, confidentiality, and funded access options.
entries.value: हो. Schools public product आधी वापरू शकतात, मग school-specific workflows, confidentiality आणि funded access options असलेल्या custom AI learning spaces बद्दल चर्चा करू शकतात.

entries.source: Yes. Subject hubs are public pages built for learners, Google, and AI answer engines. They expose only public learning guidance and public guest-mode URLs, not private saved chats.
entries.value: हो. Subject hubs ही learners, Google आणि AI answer engines साठी बांधलेली public pages आहेत. ती फक्त public learning guidance आणि public guest-mode URLs expose करतात, private saved chats नाही.

entries.source: Yes. Teachers and school leaders can use the public prompt library to evaluate learning behaviors before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: हो. tailored school deployment बद्दल चर्चा करण्यापूर्वी teachers आणि school leaders public prompt library वापरून learning behaviors evaluate करू शकतात.

entries.source: Yes. The guide library links into public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, flashcards, and historical conversations.
entries.value: हो. guide library Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, flashcards आणि historical conversations सारख्या public guest modes मध्ये link करते.

entries.source: Yes. The historical person mode is a learning simulation for perspective and questioning. It should not be cited as an authenticated quotation.
entries.value: हो. historical person mode हा perspective आणि questioning साठी learning simulation आहे. authenticated quotation म्हणून त्याचा citation करू नये.

entries.source: Yes. The linked public learning modes open in guest mode, so learners can try explanations, Socratic questions, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, and more without starting from a marketing page.
entries.value: हो. linked public learning modes guest mode मध्ये उघडतात, त्यामुळे learners marketing page पासून सुरू न करता explanations, Socratic questions, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards आणि अधिक try करू शकतात.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest learning modes are designed for free access, so learners can start without needing a school deployment or paid account.
entries.value: हो. public guest learning modes free access साठी designed आहेत, त्यामुळे learners ना school deployment किंवा paid account शिवाय सुरू करता येते.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
entries.value: हो. public guest modes आणि audience pages अशी design केलेली आहेत की parents त्यावर अवलंबून राहण्यापूर्वी learning behavior inspect करू शकतात.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: हो. tailored school deployment बद्दल चर्चा करण्यापूर्वी public guest modes school leaders आणि teachers ना learning experience try करू देतात.

entries.source: Yes. The public Homework Coach is available at /chat/homework-coach, and this subject hub links to the supporting modes and guides.
entries.value: हो. public Homework Coach /chat/homework-coach येथे उपलब्ध आहे, आणि हा subject hub supporting modes आणि guides ना link करतो.

entries.source: Yes. The recommended use is hints, explanations, step checks, feedback, and review prompts rather than final answers you cannot explain.
entries.value: हो. recommended use म्हणजे तुम्हाला explain करता येणार नाही अशी final answers नव्हे, तर hints, explanations, step checks, feedback आणि review prompts.

entries.source: Yes. Use Time Travel for context, History Cause and Effect for argument structure, Debate for counterarguments, and Source Critic for evidence boundaries.
entries.value: हो. context साठी Time Travel, argument structure साठी History Cause and Effect, counterarguments साठी Debate आणि evidence boundaries साठी Source Critic वापरा.

entries.source: You are solely responsible for your conduct and any data, text, information, screen names, graphics, photos, profiles, audio and video clips, links ("Content") that you submit, post, and display on the inspir platform. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) uses the collected data for various purposes: To provide and maintain our Service To notify you about changes to our Service To allow you to participate in interactive features of our Service when you choose to do so to provide customer support To gather analysis or valuable information so that we can improve our Service To monitor the usage of our Service to detect, prevent and address technical issues To fulfil any other purpose for which you provide it To carry out our obligations and enforce our rights arising from any contracts entered into between you and us, including for billing and collection To provide you with notices about your account and/or subscription, including expiration and renewal notices, email-instructions, etc To provide you with news, special offers and general information about other goods, services and events which we offer that are similar to those that you have already purchased or enquired about unless you have opted not to receive such information In any other way we may describe when you provide the information For any other purpose with your consent
entries.value: तुमचे conduct आणि inspir platform वर तुम्ही submit, post आणि display करता त्या कोणत्याही data, text, information, screen names, graphics, photos, profiles, audio आणि video clips, links ("Content") साठी तुम्ही एकटेच responsible आहात. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) collected data विविध purposes साठी वापरते: आमची Service provide आणि maintain करण्यासाठी; आमच्या Service मधील changes बद्दल तुम्हाला notify करण्यासाठी; तुम्ही तसे निवडल्यास आमच्या Service च्या interactive features मध्ये participate करण्याची परवानगी देण्यासाठी; customer support provide करण्यासाठी; analysis किंवा valuable information gather करण्यासाठी जेणेकरून आम्ही आमची Service improve करू शकू; technical issues detect, prevent आणि address करण्यासाठी आमच्या Service चा usage monitor करण्यासाठी; तुम्ही data दिलेला इतर कोणताही purpose fulfil करण्यासाठी; billing आणि collection सहित तुमच्यात आणि आमच्यात झालेल्या contracts मधून निर्माण झालेल्या आमच्या obligations carry out आणि rights enforce करण्यासाठी; तुमच्या account आणि/किंवा subscription बद्दल notices, including expiration आणि renewal notices, email-instructions इ. provide करण्यासाठी; तुम्ही अशी information receive न करण्याचा option निवडला नसेल तर तुम्ही आधी purchase किंवा enquire केलेल्या goods, services आणि events सारखी आम्ही offer करत असलेली news, special offers आणि general information provide करण्यासाठी; तुम्ही information देता तेव्हा आम्ही describe करू शकू अशा इतर कोणत्याही way मध्ये; तुमच्या consent सह इतर कोणत्याही purpose साठी.

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: तुमच्या real problem च्या rough version नेही तुम्ही सुरू करू शकता. messy first prompt ठीक आहे. तुम्ही सुरू केल्यावर session level, audience, deadline आणि style स्पष्ट करू शकते.

entries.source: You can contact our Copyright Agent via email at support@inspir.app
entries.value: तुम्ही आमच्या Copyright Agent शी support@inspir.app वर email द्वारे संपर्क करू शकता

entries.source: You can try the format in Talk to a Historical Person. If you want the wider scene before meeting a person, use Time Travel to visit a period, inspect constraints, and then ask what choices people actually had.
entries.value: हा format Talk to a Historical Person मध्ये try करू शकता. एखाद्या person ला भेटण्यापूर्वी wider scene हवा असल्यास, एखादा period visit करण्यासाठी Time Travel वापरा, constraints inspect करा, आणि मग लोकांकडे प्रत्यक्षात कोणते choices होते ते विचारा.

entries.source: You know a Socratic AI tutor worked when the learner can do three things:
entries.value: learner तीन गोष्टी करू शकला की Socratic AI tutor कामाला आला हे कळते:

entries.source: You may provide us either directly at support@inspir.app or via third party sites and tools with information and feedback concerning errors, suggestions for improvements, ideas, problems, complaints, and other matters related to our Service (“Feedback”). You acknowledge and agree that: (i) you shall not retain, acquire or assert any intellectual property right or other right, title or interest in or to the Feedback; (ii) Company may have development ideas similar to the Feedback; (iii) Feedback does not contain confidential information or proprietary information from you or any third party; and (iv) Company is not under any obligation of confidentiality with respect to the Feedback. In the event the transfer of the ownership to the Feedback is not possible due to applicable mandatory laws, you grant Company and its affiliates an exclusive, transferable, irrevocable, free-of-charge, sub-licensable, unlimited and perpetual right to use (including copy, modify, create derivative works, publish, distribute and commercialize) Feedback in any manner and for any purpose.
entries.value: आमच्या Service (“Feedback”) शी related errors, improvements साठी suggestions, ideas, problems, complaints आणि इतर matters बद्दल information व feedback तुम्ही थेट support@inspir.app वर किंवा third party sites आणि tools द्वारे आम्हाला provide करू शकता. तुम्ही acknowledge आणि agree करता की: (i) Feedback मध्ये किंवा त्यावर कोणताही intellectual property right किंवा इतर right, title किंवा interest तुम्ही retain, acquire किंवा assert करणार नाही; (ii) Company कडे Feedback सारख्या development ideas असू शकतात; (iii) Feedback मध्ये तुमच्याकडून किंवा कोणत्याही third party कडून confidential information किंवा proprietary information नसते; आणि (iv) Feedback संदर्भात Company वर confidentiality ची obligation नाही. applicable mandatory laws मुळे Feedback चे ownership transfer शक्य नसल्यास, तुम्ही Company आणि तिच्या affiliates ना Feedback कोणत्याही manner आणि कोणत्याही purpose साठी use करण्याचा (copy, modify, derivative works create, publish, distribute आणि commercialize सहित) exclusive, transferable, irrevocable, free-of-charge, sub-licensable, unlimited आणि perpetual right grant करता.

entries.source: You may submit a notification pursuant to the Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) by providing our Copyright Agent with the following information in writing (see 17 U.S.C 512(c)(3) for further detail):
entries.value: Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) नुसार तुम्ही आमच्या Copyright Agent ला खालील information लिखित स्वरूपात provide करून notification submit करू शकता (अधिक detail साठी 17 U.S.C 512(c)(3) पहा):

entries.source: You may use Service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with Terms. You agree not to use Service:
entries.value: तुम्ही Service फक्त lawful purposes साठी आणि Terms नुसार वापरू शकता. तुम्ही Service अशा प्रकारे न वापरण्यास agree करता:

entries.source: Your Data Protection Rights Under General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
entries.value: General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) अंतर्गत तुमचे Data Protection Rights

entries.source: Your Data Protection Rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA)
entries.value: California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) अंतर्गत तुमचे Data Protection Rights

entries.source: Your Data Protection Rights under the California Privacy Protection Act (CalOPPA)
entries.value: California Privacy Protection Act (CalOPPA) अंतर्गत तुमचे Data Protection Rights

entries.source: Your information, including Personal Data, may be transferred to – and maintained on – computers located outside of your state, province, country or other governmental jurisdiction where the data protection laws may differ from those of your jurisdiction. If you are located outside India and choose to provide information to us, please note that we transfer the data, including Personal Data, to India and process it there. Your consent to this Privacy Policy followed by your submission of such information represents your agreement to that transfer. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) will take all the steps reasonably necessary to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy and no transfer of your Personal Data will take place to an organisation or a country unless there are adequate controls in place including the security of your data and other personal information.
entries.value: तुमची information, Personal Data सहित, तुमच्या state, province, country किंवा इतर governmental jurisdiction च्या बाहेर असलेल्या computers वर transfer आणि maintained केली जाऊ शकते, जिथे data protection laws तुमच्या jurisdiction पेक्षा वेगळे असू शकतात. तुम्ही India बाहेर असाल आणि आम्हाला information provide करणे निवडल्यास, कृपया लक्षात ठेवा की आम्ही Personal Data सहित data India मध्ये transfer करून तिथे process करतो. या Privacy Policy ला तुमचा consent आणि त्यानंतर अशी information submit करणे म्हणजे त्या transfer ला तुमची agreement आहे. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) तुमचा data securely आणि या Privacy Policy नुसार treat केला जावा यासाठी reasonably necessary सर्व steps घेईल, आणि तुमच्या data व इतर personal information च्या security सहित adequate controls नसल्याशिवाय तुमचा Personal Data कोणत्याही organisation किंवा country ला transfer केला जाणार नाही.
